name: Open Terminal
description: A lightweight, self-hosted terminal that gives AI agents and automation tools a dedicated environment to run commands, manage files, and execute code over a simple REST API. Replicates the latest most-complete image: ships Node.js 22, a GCC toolchain, FFmpeg, LaTeX and a data-science Python stack.

notes.text: API key is auto-generated at install and saved in /opt/openterminal/.env (OPEN_TERMINAL_API_KEY).
Commands run directly inside the LXC with root privileges. Only expose to trusted networks or behind the Open WebUI proxy.
